title: Claude Just Changed How Enterprises Work Forever (Claude Tag)
summary: Cyril Imhof discusses Claude Tag, a new feature from Anthropic that impacts enterprise workflows. The video covers Claude Tag, industry challenges including SaaS market conditions, and open source developments in China.

The coverage extends to SaaS market dynamics and open source developments coming out of China. Recurring threads include prompt engineering, enterprise AI deployment, and model capabilities.
